case_title: JOSEPH IGBOKWE ET AL VS. TURKISH AIRLINES INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY IGBOKWE, JOSEPH TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IGBOKWE, JOSEPH IGBOKWE, CHILE AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF IGBOKWE, JOSEPH IGBOKWE, CHILE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. 506 PLAINTIFF JOSEPH IGBOKWE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CHILE IGBOKWE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY IBRAHIM GUNER, STATION MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
FILED NOTICE FROM C T CORPORATION STATING THAT C T CORPORATION SYSTEM IS NOT THE REGISTERED AGENT FOR AN ENTITY BY THE NAME OF TURKISH AIRLINES, INC. C T WAS UNABLE TO FORWARD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IGBOKWE, JOSEPH IGBOKWE, CHILE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (USED ACCESS CENTER TO CORRECT THE AGENT OF SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IGBOKWE, JOSEPH IGBOKWE, CHILE AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-02-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY IGBOKWE, JOSEPH IGBOKWE, CHILE AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF IGBOKWE, JOSEPH IGBOKWE, CHILE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-18-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
